name: streaming-pipeline
description: Real-time streaming pipelines with Kafka, Flink, RisingWave, Redpanda. Covers exactly-once, windowing, stateful processing, CDC, and stream processing patterns.
author: anwar

commands.name: stream:flink
commands.prompt:
Create Flink streaming job with:
- Source: Kafka, Pulsar, Kinesis, file, custom
- Processing: DataStream API, Table API, SQL
- Windowing: tumbling, sliding, session, global
- State: keyed state, operator state, RocksDB backend
- Checkpointing: exactly-once, unaligned, incremental
- Watermarks: periodic, punctuated, idleness
- Joins: interval, temporal, lookup, CDC
- Sinks: Kafka, JDBC, Elasticsearch, Iceberg, custom
- Serialization: Avro, Protobuf, JSON, schema registry
- Metrics: Prometheus, custom, latency tracking
- Savepoints: upgrade, migration, A/B testing
- Deployment: Kubernetes, YARN, standalone
- SQL: Flink SQL, CDC connectors, materialized views

commands.name: stream:risingwave
commands.prompt:
Create RisingWave streaming pipeline with:
- Sources: Kafka, Pulsar, Kinesis, CDC (Debezium), files
- Materialized views: incremental, real-time
- Joins: stream-stream, stream-table, temporal
- Windowing: tumbling, hopping, session
- Functions: UDF/UDAF (Python, Rust, WASM)
- Sinks: Kafka, JDBC, Elasticsearch, custom
- Schema: Avro, Protobuf, JSON, schema registry
- Monitoring: Grafana, Prometheus, built-in metrics
- High availability: standby, failover
- Scaling: parallelism, compute/storage separation

commands.name: stream:cdc
commands.prompt:
Build CDC pipeline with:
- Sources: Debezium (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, SQL Server, Oracle)
- Capture: snapshots, incremental, transaction logs
- Transform: SMTs, filtering, routing, masking
- Delivery: Kafka, Pulsar, Redpanda, RisingWave
- Schema: Avro, Protobuf, JSON, Schema Registry
- Exactly-once: idempotent writes, deduplication
- Ordering: per-key, global, partition
- Lag monitoring: consumer groups, offsets
- Schema evolution: compatibility, migration
- Recovery: offset management, replay, backfill

commands.name: stream:kafka
commands.prompt:
Create Kafka streaming app with:
- Kafka Streams: topology, state stores, punctuation
- ksqlDB: streams, tables, pull/push queries
- Serialization: Avro, Protobuf, JSON, Schema Registry
- Processing: map, filter, join, aggregate, window
- State: RocksDB, in-memory, changelog topics
- Exactly-once: EOS v2/v3, transactional producers
- Testing: TopologyTestDriver, embedded Kafka
- Monitoring: JMX, Prometheus, Confluent Control Center
- Deployment: Kafka Connect, ksqlDB server, standalone
- Patterns: enrichment, deduplication, sessionization

agents.name: streaming-engineer
agents.description: Streaming engineer for real-time data platforms
agents.prompt: You are a streaming engineer. Build real-time systems with: Flink, RisingWave, Kafka Streams, ksqlDB, Redpanda. Focus on: exactly-once semantics, low latency, stateful processing, windowing, CDC, schema evolution, operational simplicity. Write production code with monitoring, testing, and documentation.
